Package neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem

Class ProcessSafetySystemReviewEngine

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.processsafetysystem.ProcessSafetySystemReviewEngine
public class ProcessSafetySystemReviewEngine extends Object
Deterministic NORSOK S-001 Clause 10 review engine for process safety systems.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

    containsAny(String text, String... keywords)
    Tests whether text contains any keyword ignoring case.

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public ProcessSafetySystemReviewReport evaluate(ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput input)
      Evaluates normalized process safety system review input.
      Parameters:
      input - normalized review input
      Returns:
      aggregated review report

    • evaluateItem

      public ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult evaluateItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Evaluates one process safety system review item.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      item review result

    • evaluateCoverage

      private ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult evaluateCoverage(ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput input)
      Evaluates whether the input has broad Clause 10 coverage.
      Parameters:
      input - review input
      Returns:
      synthetic coverage result

    • addCoverageAssessment

      private void addCoverageAssessment(ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result, ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput input, String requirementId, String clause, String typeToken, String passMessage, String recommendation)
      Adds a coverage assessment for a function type.
      Parameters:
      result - result receiving the assessment
      input - review input
      requirementId - requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      typeToken - function type token
      passMessage - pass message
      recommendation - recommendation for missing evidence

    • checkRoleAndInterfaces

      private void checkRoleAndInterfaces(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result)
      Checks role and interface evidence.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      result - result receiving assessments

    • checkSafetyLifecycle

      private void checkSafetyLifecycle(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result)
      Checks lifecycle traceability from hazard identification to operation.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      result - result receiving assessments

      private void checkOperationalEvidence(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result)
      Checks optional tagreader or instrument-data evidence.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      result - result receiving assessments

    • checkEvidenceQuality

      private void checkEvidenceQuality(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result)
      Checks technical-documentation and source-reference quality.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      result - result receiving assessments

    • addRequiredBoolean

      private void addRequiredBoolean(ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result, ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, String requirementId, String clause, String[] keys, String passMessage, String recommendation)
      Adds a boolean requirement assessment.
      Parameters:
      result - result receiving the assessment
      item - review item
      requirementId - requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      keys - boolean evidence keys
      passMessage - message when requirement is met
      recommendation - recommendation for missing or failing evidence

    • compareTimes

      private void compareTimes(ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result, ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, String requirementId, String clause, String actualKey, String limitKey, String actualLabel, String limitLabel)
      Compares two time values.
      Parameters:
      result - result receiving assessment
      item - review item
      requirementId - requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      actualKey - key for actual or required value depending on wording
      limitKey - key for limit value depending on wording
      actualLabel - actual value label
      limitLabel - limit value label

    • compareMinimum

      private void compareMinimum(ProcessSafetySystemReviewResult result, ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, String requirementId, String clause, String minimumKey, String providedKey, String minimumLabel, String providedLabel)
      Compares a documented capacity or duration against a minimum required value.
      Parameters:
      result - result receiving assessment
      item - review item
      requirementId - requirement identifier
      clause - clause identifier
      minimumKey - key for the minimum required value
      providedKey - key for the documented provided value
      minimumLabel - minimum value label
      providedLabel - provided value label

    • calculateConfidence

      private double calculateConfidence(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Calculates evidence confidence from key fields and source references.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      confidence from 0 to 1

    • hasType

      private boolean hasType(ProcessSafetySystemReviewInput input, String typeToken)
      Tests whether the input has an item matching a type token.
      Parameters:
      input - review input
      typeToken - type token
      Returns:
      true when an item matches the type

    • hasTypeEvidence

      private boolean hasTypeEvidence(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item, String typeToken)
      Tests whether an item has evidence keys for a type.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      typeToken - type token
      Returns:
      true when item has matching evidence keys

    • isPsdItem

      private boolean isPsdItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is PSD-related.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when item is PSD-related

    • isPsvItem

      private boolean isPsvItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is PSV-related.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when item is PSV-related

      private boolean isAlarmItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is alarm-related.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when item is alarm-related

    • isActionOrInstrumentedItem

      private boolean isActionOrInstrumentedItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is an action or instrumented item.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when response time is applicable

    • isLogicItem

      private boolean isLogicItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is logic-solver related.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when item is logic-solver related

    • isSecondaryPressureItem

      private boolean isSecondaryPressureItem(ProcessSafetySystemReviewItem item)
      Tests whether an item is secondary pressure protection related.
      Parameters:
      item - review item
      Returns:
      true when item is secondary pressure protection related

    • joinKeys

      private String joinKeys(String[] keys)
      Joins keys for report text.
      Parameters:
      keys - keys to join
      Returns:
      comma-separated keys

    • containsAny

      private boolean containsAny(String text, String... keywords)
      Tests whether text contains any keyword ignoring case.
      Parameters:
      text - text to search
      keywords - keywords to find
      Returns:
      true when any keyword is present

    • containsIgnoreCase

      private boolean containsIgnoreCase(String text, String token)
      Tests whether text contains a token ignoring case.
      Parameters:
      text - text to search
      token - token to find
      Returns:
      true when token is present
